title: ServerGuardian
description: An all-in-one Paper 1.21 plugin for moderation, anti-grief, performance tools, and essential server utilities.
body:
ServerGuardian – Essential Moderation & Utility Suite ️


ServerGuardian is a comprehensive moderation, protection, and utility plugin designed for Paper 1.21 servers. This all-in-one solution helps server owners maintain a safe, lag-free, and enjoyable experience for all players without needing to install multiple plugins.


Perfect for survival, factions, SMPs, and minigame servers — ServerGuardian gives admins the tools they need to detect rule-breaking, prevent griefing, reduce lag, and enhance player management in one lightweight, feature-rich package.



Key Features
️ Anti-Grief & Protection

Protects spawn area, warps, and regions from unauthorized building/breaking
Chest protection (only owners can open their chests)
Block blacklist to stop players from placing dangerous items (TNT, lava, etc.)
Region protection (with WorldGuard integration)

Advanced Moderation

/ban, /mute, /warn, /kick commands with reasons and durations
Chat filter to block swear words, spam, and advertising
Join/Quit logger to track player activity
Real-time staff notifications for suspicious behavior
Auto-ban system after reaching warning threshold

Performance Tools

/lagcheck command to analyze server TPS and find lag-causing entities/chunks
Auto-clear lag feature that removes excess dropped items & mobs
Heavy chunk analysis to identify performance bottlenecks
TPS monitoring with staff alerts

Chat & Communication

Staff-only chat (/staffchat)
Global announcements (/broadcast)
Custom join/quit messages
Anti-spam and anti-advertisement filters

⚡ Quality-of-Life Utilities

/back to return to last location after death or teleport
/spawn, /home, /sethome commands
Player teleport requests (/tpa, /tpaccept, /tpdeny)
Command help system (/serverguardian help)


Commands
/serverguardian help - Show help menu
/serverguardian commands - List all available commands
/ban <player> [reason] - Ban a player
/mute <player> [duration] [reason] - Mute a player
/warn <player> <reason] - Warn a player
/staffchat - Toggle staff chat
/lagcheck - Check server performance
/back - Return to last location
/tpa <player> - Request teleport
/broadcast <message> - Send global announcement

Permissions
serverguardian.* - All permissions
serverguardian.ban - Ban permission
serverguardian.mute - Mute permission
serverguardian.staffchat - Staff chat permission
serverguardian.lagcheck - Lag check permission
serverguardian.back - Back command permission
serverguardian.tpa - TPA command permission
